0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Streaming & Delta Sync"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Real-time memory event streaming and incremental synchronization for distributed agent setups."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"MemoryStream"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Thread-safe event stream with push (callbacks) and pull (iterator) patterns."}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\nstream = mem.stream\n\nmem.remember(\"test memory\")\n\n# Pull via callback\nstream.on_event(lambda event: print(f\"Event: {event.type}\"))\n\n# Pull via iterator\nfor event in stream:\n  process(event)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"DeltaSync"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Checkpoint-based incremental synchronization."}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"mem_a = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"agent-a\")\nmem_b = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"agent-b\")\n\n# Compute and apply delta\ndelta = mem_a.delta_sync.compute_delta()\nmem_b.delta_sync.apply_delta(delta)\n\n# Bidirectional sync\nmem_a.delta_sync.sync_to(mem_b)\nmem_a.delta_sync.sync_from(mem_b)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[false,["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"DeltaSync uses memory IDs and timestamps for minimal change sets.
